data.cra7c_description: Comprehensive assessment covering ES6+ features, async programming, and DOM manipulation
Full-length IELTS Academic practice test with all four skills: Listening, Reading, Writing, and Speaking

data.cra7c_instructions: Answer all multiple-choice questions about JavaScript fundamentals
Explain array manipulation techniques in your own words
Write working JavaScript code to solve the given problems
Listen to the audio recordings and answer the questions
Read the passage carefully and answer the questions
data.cra7c_passagetext: Climate change represents one of the most significant challenges facing humanity in the 21st century. Scientists have observed a consistent warming trend over the past several decades, with global temperatures rising at an unprecedented rate. This phenomenon is primarily attributed to increased concentrations of greenhouse gases in the atmosphere, particularly carbon dioxide from fossil fuel combustion.

data.cra7c_instructions: Write an essay of at least 250 words on the given topic
Record your spoken responses to the interview questions

LocalizedLabels.Label: Exam sections for organizing question types

data.cra7c_questiontext: Which keyword is used to declare a block-scoped variable in ES6?
What does the spread operator (...) do in JavaScript?
data.cra7c_optionsjson: ["Creates a new array", "Expands an array into individual elements", "Deletes array elements", "Sorts an array"]
data.cra7c_correctanswer: Expands an array into individual elements

data.cra7c_questiontext: Explain the difference between map() and forEach() array methods.
Describe a use case for the filter() method with an example.
Write a function that takes an array of numbers and returns only the even numbers using the filter method.
Create a function that uses the reduce method to calculate the sum of all numbers in an array.
data.cra7c_correctanswer: function sumArray(arr) { return arr.reduce((acc, num) => acc + num, 0); }

data.cra7c_questiontext: What is the main topic of the conversation?
When does the speaker plan to submit the application?
According to the passage, what is the primary cause of climate change?
data.cra7c_optionsjson: ["Natural weather cycles", "Solar radiation", "Greenhouse gas emissions", "Ocean currents"]

data.cra7c_questiontext: What does the author suggest about the rate of temperature increase?
data.cra7c_optionsjson: ["It is slowing down", "It is unprecedented", "It is cyclical", "It is uncertain"]

data.cra7c_questiontext: Some people believe that technology has made our lives more complicated rather than simpler. To what extent do you agree or disagree?
Describe a memorable event from your childhood. Why was it significant to you?
What are the advantages and disadvantages of social media in modern society?

data.cra7c_responsesummary: Expands an array into individual elements
data.cra7c_answertext: Expands an array into individual elements
map() creates a new array with transformed values and returns it, while forEach() just iterates without returning anything
function sumArray(arr) { let sum = 0; for(let i=0; i<arr.length; i++) { sum += arr[i]; } return sum; }
data.cra7c_graderfeedback: Works but doesn't use reduce as requested

data.cra7c_answertext: map returns new array, forEach doesn't return
data.cra7c_graderfeedback: Correct but brief, could provide more detail

data.cra7c_answertext: function sumArray(arr) { return arr.reduce((total, current) => total + current, 0); }
Technology has both simplified and complicated our lives. While smartphones connect us instantly, they also create constant distractions...
I believe technology has made life simpler in many ways, providing tools for communication, productivity, and entertainment that were unimaginable decades ago...

data.cra7c_graderfeedback: Clear delivery, good details about the childhood birthday party
Mentioned advantages but rushed through disadvantages

data.cra7c_questiontext: What is the correct way to handle errors in async/await?
data.cra7c_optionsjson: ["Use try-catch blocks", "Use .then() and .catch()", "Use error callbacks", "Promises don't need error handling"]

data.cra7c_questiontext: Which syntax correctly destructures the first two elements of an array?
data.cra7c_optionsjson: ["let [a, b] = array;", "let {a, b} = array;", "let (a, b) = array;", "let a, b = array;"]

data.cra7c_questiontext: Explain how the justify-content property works in a flex container and provide three common values.
Write a list comprehension that creates a list of squares for all even numbers from 1 to 20.
data.cra7c_correctanswer: squares = [x**2 for x in range(1, 21) if x % 2 == 0]

data.cra7c_questiontext: According to recent scientific studies, what are the three primary effects of climate change on marine ecosystems?
data.cra7c_optionsjson: ["Ocean acidification, rising sea temperatures, coral bleaching", "Increased rainfall, stronger currents, larger fish populations", "Deeper ocean trenches, more hurricanes, colder poles", "Higher salinity, fewer waves, more underwater volcanoes"]
data.cra7c_correctanswer: Ocean acidification, rising sea temperatures, coral bleaching

data.cra7c_questiontext: Write a formal email to a university professor requesting an extension on your research assignment due to unforeseen circumstances. Include proper salutation, explanation, and closing.
